song.title: You Are More
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] One the day I called, You answered me And the hope in my soul increased I lift my hands and turn my eyes To the God who heals my heart And gives me peace
[C] You are more than My words could ever say You are Lord over all, Over all of my days I will see this season through, I will fix my eyes on You Only You, only You
[V2] I worship You and lift You high God forever let Your name be glorified I lift my voice and sing Your name For You gave Your life to cleanse my sin And took away my shame
[B] Hallelujah, the earth will sing May Your name be glorified
